PyTorch / ROCm wheels (https://download.pytorch.org/whl/rocm6.4)

OMP — Oh My Pi (https://github.com/nicobrenner/oh-my-pi)
- Use: host application; this repository ships an extension loaded by OMP. No OMP code is bundled.
